blocks.content:
# Create your first dashboard

This is a **standard challenge**. There's no VM, no terminal — you'll do this in your own Grafana instance. Click _Check my work_ when you think you're done.

blocks.title: Create a dashboard named "My First Dashboard"
blocks.brief: Create a new dashboard in Grafana and save it with the exact title **My First Dashboard**. The content of the dashboard doesn't matter — only the title.

hintLevels.text: Open the main menu and look for **Dashboards** → **New** → **New dashboard**.
After creating the dashboard, click the gear icon (settings) to set its title, then save with `Ctrl+S` / `Cmd+S`. The title must match exactly: `My First Dashboard`.

blocks.failureMessage: Pathfinder couldn't find a dashboard with that title yet. Make sure you've saved the dashboard with the exact title 'My First Dashboard'.

blocks.content:
## Nice work

You've built and saved your first Grafana dashboard. From here, you can add panels, configure data sources, and start visualising real data.
